seoTitle: Mount Saint Thomas vs Mount Tenandra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Saint Thomas and Mount Tenandra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Saint Thomas vs Mount Tenandra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Saint Thomas and Mount Tenandra.
heading: Mount Saint Thomas vs Mount Tenandra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Saint Thomas, New South Wales and Mount Tenandra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Tenandra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mount Saint Thomas (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Saint Thomas or Mount Tenandra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Saint Thomas has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Mount Tenandra scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Saint Thomas scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Tenandra scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Saint Thomas or Mount Tenandra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Tenandra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
